gaps: A consistency check that prevents resolved snapshots from being labeled forward
Clearer distinction between CourtListener cluster IDs and opinion IDs
helpful: CourtListener MCP pre-filing opinion search and opinion text
notes: The legal-research tools were useful, but the required snapshot disclosed the event outcome and no filing text was provisioned. One endpoint fetch returned an irrelevant opinion because a search-result URL exposed a cluster ID where the opinion endpoint required the underlying opinion ID; a follow-up search resolved it.
